description: Convert natural language into validated Liquibase XML or SQL changesets. 19 tools, 12 databases.
name: io.github.liquibase/changelog-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Liquibase Pro license key (required for server operation)
environmentVariables.name: LIQUIBASE_LICENSE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Output format for generated changesets: xml (default) or formatted-sql
environmentVariables.name: LIQUIBASE_MCP_OUTPUT_FORMAT

environmentVariables.description: Target database dialect for Formatted SQL output (postgresql, mysql, mariadb, oracle, mssql, h2, db2, sybase, sqlite, hsqldb, derby, firebird)
environmentVariables.name: LIQUIBASE_MCP_SQL_DATABASE

environmentVariables.description: Skip H2 in-memory database validation of generated changesets
environmentVariables.name: LIQUIBASE_MCP_DISABLE_VALIDATION

environmentVariables.description: Generate explicit rollback blocks in XML changesets
environmentVariables.name: LIQUIBASE_MCP_INCLUDE_ROLLBACK

title: Liquibase Changelog MCP Server
